title: Jensen Huang
html:
Jensen Huang — NVIDIA CEO, one of Yahir's . Yahir prepped 8+ questions for what looks like a Jensen public appearance/talk in April 2024, spanning AI ethics, simulation theory, post-automation jobs, and the iconic leather jacket origin.

What we know

  • Yahir's relationship: one-way (mentor-from-afar / public-figure aspirational).
  • The Q&A prep (2024 04 09 jensen questions): "are we in a simulation?", "AI girlfriends?", "shift from servant-master to collaborative partner with AI?", "masayoshi son, what is your relationship with him?", "the leather jacket origin story?", "70% jobs automated UBI scenario?".
  • Jensen + Lisa parallel: Yahir's question "How important part has Lisa played in your success?" surfaces the Lisa Su (AMD CEO) parallel.
  • Connection to Masayoshi Son: Yahir treats Jensen and Masa as paired figures of the AI era.
  • Yahir's AI thesis (yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026) tracks NVIDIA / Jensen as one of the macro signals.

Open questions

  • Did Yahir attend the Jensen event? Was a question selected?
  • Specific event — OSU appearance? NVIDIA GTC? Podcast?
